untranslatable_reason: The signal requires detecting '10 consecutive higher highs' which requires multi-bar lookback pattern recognition (counting consecutive bars meeting a condition over N periods). The allowed indicators do not include a consecutive-bar counter or pattern detector. The 'congestion area of loose price movement' also requires volatility contraction detection not directly available in the indicator set. Only basic single-bar comparisons are translatable.
translation_notes: Partially translated entry using higher high (close > prev_close) and bullish body as proxies for consecutive buying pressure. True pattern detection requires custom pattern recognition beyond indicator-based rule engine capability. Exit uses reversal signal per rules (price closes below previous close). Hold period set to 10 days matching target regimes.
